summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpenClaw Logs page - terminal-style real-time log viewer with filtering, search, and auto-refresh functionality. All core features working correctly.
passed_tests: Logs page loads at /logs route with terminal-style viewer
Auto-refresh every 3 seconds generates new log entries (LIVE mode working)
Following toggle switch controls pause/resume and auto-scroll
Filters button successfully toggles filter panel visibility
Level filter buttons (DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR) present and functional
Source filter buttons (gateway/agent/channel/session/tool/skill/cron/hooks) present and functional
Search input filters logs by message content
Clear button accessible for removing all logs
Terminal title bar shows 'openclaw logs --follow' command with dynamic updates
LIVE indicator shows when streaming is active (green dot + text)
Scroll to top/bottom buttons work correctly
Log lines are properly color-coded by level (DEBUG gray, INFO blue, WARN yellow, ERROR red)
Log lines are properly color-coded by source (different colors per source type)
Stats bar in filter panel shows total, errors, warnings breakdown
Backend API GET /api/system-logs returns log entries correctly
Backend API POST /api/system-logs/generate creates new log entries (5-12 per call)
Backend API GET /api/system-logs/stats returns aggregated statistics
Logs navigation item appears in sidebar and highlights when active
Real-time log streaming shows various log sources and levels
Terminal-style interface with proper title bar (colored dots, command display)
Log entries display with proper timestamp, level, source, and message structure

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All system logs API endpoints working perfectly
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI features and integrations working correctly
